summary: Focused r2 fold-verification. All three r1 blockers folded faithfully and independently confirmed: B1 Art.VI supremacy rescoped to GOVERNANCE/PROCESS with machine-SSoT-wins-for-facts (incl. this document itself) and the registries in the ladder — no residual circularity, aligns with EM:9-11 verbatim; B2 Art.V enumerates all three DMC_GATE_* knobs verified against the frozen runner (EXCLUDED :16/:36, PROTECTED :21/:37, UPSTREAM :38) with the PROTECTED-only G4 guardrail + general any-blocking-override discipline; B3 Art.II gains the 13 CI blocking checks + 2 porcelain sandwiches (CF14 verified), the 3 orchestration registries, and settings.json hook registrations; the 55-file KEEP cite corrected to the M10 plan §Approval Status (verified line 433). A1/A2/A3 folded (amendment-time lexeme re-run; AC3 6-surface grep; cite-density AC). Plan schema-VALID. Security clean (docs-only, secret floor un-weakenable). APPROVE with 3 low advisories (A5 VC-table grep alignment, A6 cite :36-38, A7 schemas symmetry in Art.II) — all three folded by the orchestrator upon receipt (pre-approval polish).
